profile.name: Mayank Sharma
profile.title: Backend Software Engineer
profile.bio: Backend Software Engineer working with Spring Boot, Python, and SQL, currently building a live AI-powered blogging platform end-to-end. Hands-on experience with REST APIs, NestJS, and applied AI features such as RAG, embeddings, and semantic search.

experience.description: Building Blookmark, a live AI-powered blogging platform, end-to-end with Spring Boot, React, MySQL, and Redis.
highlights: Build and maintain Blookmark, a live AI-powered blogging platform, using Spring Boot, React, MySQL, and Redis — reaching 700+ users and 28K+ page views in 2026 with a 5m+ average engagement time, driven by organic search and social referrals.

Engineered AI-assisted content generation and semantic search with vector embeddings, plus a hierarchical CMS, JWT authentication with role-based access control, SEO optimization, and an analytics/admin dashboard.
Automated Excel-to-MySQL data ingestion with Python pipelines that clean, validate, and load datasets, replacing manual data entry.

experience.description: Built production REST APIs and contributed to ATS platform, Harbor video conferencing integration, and Squareboat CMS across full-stack systems.
highlights: Delivered 15+ production REST APIs in NestJS, Django, and MySQL — reducing average API latency by 35% through query optimization and caching.
Contributed frontend and backend features to an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) processing 500+ applications monthly, and integrated the Harbor video conferencing platform for candidate screening.
Shipped enhancements and bug fixes to backend CMS features on Squareboat's live production platform.

experience.description: Implemented production features for an employee onboarding portal with secure document uploads.
highlights: Implemented secure document-upload features for an employee onboarding portal used by the HR team, streamlining onboarding for new hires.
Improved HR efficiency by centralizing employee records and digitizing document collection for 100+ onboarding cases, reducing manual paperwork.

projects.title: Blookmark — AI-Powered Blogging Platform
projects.description: Live AI-powered blogging platform built with Spring Boot, React, MySQL, and Redis — 700+ users and 28K+ page views in 2026 with 5m+ average engagement. Features a hierarchical CMS, AI-assisted content generation, semantic search with vector embeddings, JWT auth, role-based access control, SEO optimization, analytics, and an admin dashboard.

projects.title: Full Stack Job Portal
projects.description: Full-stack job portal built with FastAPI, React, MySQL, Redis, and Celery. Features JWT authentication, role-based access control, job application workflows, background task processing, and database optimizations.

projects.title: Reddit Shorts Automation
projects.description: Hobby project: an end-to-end AI content pipeline that scrapes Reddit stories, generates TTS narration with Whisper-powered subtitles, assembles short-form videos, and auto-publishes to YouTube and Instagram on a GitHub Actions schedule. FastAPI backend with a React dashboard.

projects.title: RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation
projects.description: RAG system built with Python, LangChain, embeddings, and vector databases. Implements document chunking, semantic search, retrieval pipelines, and LLM-powered question-answering workflows to improve response accuracy.

projects.title: Portfolio Maker
projects.description: Full-featured portfolio builder using TypeScript and MERN stack with dynamic templates, live publishing, and customizable design options.

projects.title: Full Stack Blog
projects.description: Complete blog platform with post creation, editing, deletion, and comments. Built with the MERN stack with a live demo available.

projects.title: Showroom Management System
projects.description: Python + MySQL CLI-based inventory and sales management system with comprehensive reporting, analytics, and stock tracking.
